channel.title: World Bank Group Job Vacancies
channel.description: List of vacancies at the World Bank Group

item.title: Executive Assistant to Regional Vice President
item.description: World Bank Group has a vacancy for the position of Executive Assistant to Regional Vice President Location: Washington, DC.
